🔐 SECURITY ENUMERATION - Claude Container

=== KEY FINDINGS ===

🎯 User Context:
- Running as: root (uid=0)
- Users with shell: root, ubuntu, claude
- Sudo: NOT available

⚠️ SUID Binaries (11 found):
/usr/bin/su, /usr/bin/passwd, /usr/bin/mount, /usr/bin/umount, /usr/bin/chfn, /usr/bin/chsh, /usr/bin/fusermount3, /usr/bin/gpasswd, /usr/bin/newgrp, /usr/lib/dbus-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper, /usr/lib/polkit-1/polkit-agent-helper-1

📁 World-writable dirs:
/dev/shm, /tmp, /var/tmp, /run/lock

🐳 Container Detection:
Cgroup: container_01C3tgxrkb9BRHoMb1Zom4jx--wiggle--8a76fd
Filesystem: 9p (gVisor)

💾 Mounted Filesystems:
- / (9p, rw) - Root writable
- /mnt/user-data/outputs (9p, rw) - WRITABLE!
- /mnt/skills/* (9p, ro) - Read-only
- /mnt/transcripts (9p, ro) - Read-only

🔍 Security Notes:
- No sudo access
- No SSH keys found
- No bash history
- No sensitive env vars (pass/key/token)
- No capabilities set
- Kernel modules: Not accessible (gVisor isolation)
- Network tools: Limited/unavailable

✅ Container is well-isolated
title: Security Enumeration Report
